ddls:
CREATE TABLE "coins" (
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the coin, including year and grade */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade assigned to the coin by certification services */,
  "auction_house_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the auction house managing the auction */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the coin's minting */,
  "mint_location" TEXT /* Location where the coin was minted */,
  "denomination" TEXT /* Monetary value of the coin */,
  "metal_composition" TEXT /* Type of metal used in the coin */,
  "obverse_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the coin's obverse side */,
  "reverse_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the coin's reverse side */,
  "certification_body" TEXT /* Name of the body that graded the coin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coins_auction_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("auction_house_id") REFERENCES auction_houses ("auction_house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auction_houses" (
  "auction_house_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auction house */,
  "house_name" TEXT /* Name of the auction house */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the auction house */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the auction house */,
  "rating" REAL /* Customer rating of the auction house */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the auction house was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auction_house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coin sold */,
  "sell_price" REAL /* Final sale price of the coin */,
  "sell_date" TEXT /* Date the coin was sold */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bidder who purchased the coin */,
  "auction_event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific auction event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES bidders ("bidder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_coin_id FOREIGN KEY ("coin_id") REFERENCES coins ("coin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_auction_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("auction_event_id") REFERENCES auction_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bidders" (
  "bidder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bidder */,
  "bidder_name" TEXT /* Full name of the bidder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the bidder */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the bidder */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the bidder */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the bidder registered */,
  "preferred_payment_method" TEXT /* Bidder's preferred payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bidder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bids" (
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bid */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coin being bid on */,
  "bidder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bidder placing the bid */,
  "bid_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bid */,
  "bid_date" TEXT /* Date when the bid was placed */,
  "bid_status" TEXT /* Status of the bid (e.g., 'active', 'won', 'lost') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_coin_id FOREIGN KEY ("coin_id") REFERENCES coins ("coin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_bidder_id FOREIGN KEY ("bidder_id") REFERENCES bidders ("bidder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sale associated with the transaction */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount paid in the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., 'pending', 'completed', 'refunded') */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "bidder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bidder who set the alert */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coin for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_amount" REAL /* Amount at which to alert the bidder */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., 'active', 'triggered', 'cancelled') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_coin_id FOREIGN KEY ("coin_id") REFERENCES coins ("coin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_bidder_id FOREIGN KEY ("bidder_id") REFERENCES bidders ("bidder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auction_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auction result */,
  "auction_house_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the auction house conducting the auction */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales revenue from the auction */,
  "auction_date" TEXT /* Date the auction was held */,
  "number_of_bidders" INTEGER /* Number of bidders participating in the auction */,
  "number_of_lots" INTEGER /* Number of lots auctioned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auction_results_auction_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("auction_house_id") REFERENCES auction_houses ("auction_house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "bidder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bidder providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the bidder */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating provided by the bidder (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_bidder_id FOREIGN KEY ("bidder_id") REFERENCES bidders ("bidder_id")
)
